name: genoa-curve-golden
description: Genoa golden curve fixtures — locked to the vendored FCC contours-api-node tvfm_curves.js (F(50,50) and F(50,10)) and gwave.js (AM groundwave).  Each expected value was generated by directly invoking the vendored FCC routines (fcc.tvfmfs_metric / fcc.amDistanceKm) against the pinned tabulations and the AM groundwave field grid, then locked as regression anchors.  Covers: FM F(50,50) service contours, FM F(50,10) interfering contours (§74.1204), AM groundwave (§73.183/§73.184), boundary/edge-case scenarios, and inverse round-trips (distance→field).  PASS proves Genoa's engine produces FCC-canonical output.

curve_dataset.comment: AM groundwave field grid is bundled in data/fcc-curves/v0.2/am_groundwave.json; sha256 pinned via the curve manifest.

basis: FCC geo.fcc.gov contour API reports distances rounded to 3 decimal places (0.001 km precision). A 0.05 km tolerance provides 50× headroom over the API rounding step.

The vendored FCC bivariate cubic surface fit (ITPLBV) introduces < 0.03 km interpolation residual across the 13-HAAT × 25-distance tabulation at typical ERP/HAAT values per our cross-validation against geo.fcc.gov.
AM groundwave grid is tabulated at discrete distance steps (1 km resolution at far ranges); 0.05 km tolerance is well within one grid step.
FCC §73.215 requires service contour radius calculation to the nearest 0.1 km for filing purposes; 0.05 km is therefore half a filing unit.
FM tvfmfs_metric round-trip (distance→field→distance) residual observed < 0.003 dBu at all tested points; 0.1 dBu provides 33× safety margin.
FCC field-strength reporting precision is 0.1 dBu per §73.333 Appendix B; matching that as the inverse tolerance is technically appropriate.
AM groundwave grid is parameterized at integer conductivity values (σ = 1..8 mS/m) and 10-kHz frequency steps; the inverse lookup introduces < 0.025 mV/m residual at tested points.
0.1 mV/m is approximately 0.5% of the 2 mV/m primary contour threshold, providing adequate sensitivity while accommodating grid quantization.

lock_statement.statement: All expected values were generated by directly invoking the vendored FCC canonical routines (tvfm_curves.js sha256=58a0cd0…, gwave.js sha256=0ba81ec…) at upstream commit b55870d3f20618e886cd02379008ef980229d44b and locked as regression anchors.  Any modification to expected values requires re-derivation from the vendored FCC source with documented justification and updated upstream provenance.  This dataset constitutes the authoritative evidence that Genoa's propagation engine is FCC-canonical for FM (§73.333) and AM groundwave (§73.183/§73.184) purposes.

cases.label: KSLX-FM Class C, 100 kW, HAAT 561 m, 100.7 MHz → 60 dBu service contour

provenance.method: 47 CFR §73.333 F(50,50) contour distance
provenance.source: fcc.tvfmfs_metric(erp=100, haat=561, ch=264, field=60, dist=0, mode=2, curve=0, flag)

cases.label: KSLX-FM Class C, 100 kW, HAAT 561 m, 100.7 MHz → 54 dBu city grade

provenance.method: 47 CFR §73.333 F(50,50) contour distance
provenance.source: fcc.tvfmfs_metric(erp=100, haat=561, ch=264, field=54, dist=0, mode=2, curve=0, flag)

cases.label: KSLX-FM Class C, 100 kW, HAAT 561 m, 100.7 MHz → 40 dBu protected

provenance.method: 47 CFR §73.333 F(50,50) contour distance
provenance.source: fcc.tvfmfs_metric(erp=100, haat=561, ch=264, field=40, dist=0, mode=2, curve=0, flag)

cases.label: Class A reference, 6 kW, HAAT 100 m, 98.7 MHz → 60 dBu

provenance.method: 47 CFR §73.333 F(50,50) contour distance
provenance.source: fcc.tvfmfs_metric(erp=6, haat=100, ch=257, field=60, dist=0, mode=2, curve=0, flag)

cases.label: Class C max reference, 100 kW, HAAT 600 m, 100.7 MHz → 60 dBu

provenance.method: 47 CFR §73.333 F(50,50) contour distance
provenance.source: fcc.tvfmfs_metric(erp=100, haat=600, ch=264, field=60, dist=0, mode=2, curve=0, flag)

cases.label: Edge: 100 kW, HAAT 1200 m (approaches FCC 1600 m clamp ceiling), 100.7 MHz → 60 dBu

provenance.method: 47 CFR §73.333 F(50,50) contour distance — extreme HAAT edge case
provenance.source: fcc.tvfmfs_metric(erp=100, haat=1200, ch=264, field=60, dist=0, mode=2, curve=0, flag); haat_used=1200m (no clamp)
provenance.edge_case_note: FCC clamps HAAT to [30, 1600] m. 1200 m is within range; test exercises the upper portion of the HAAT interpolation grid.

cases.label: Edge: 100 W, HAAT 10 m (FCC-clamped to 30 m), 100.7 MHz → 60 dBu

provenance.method: 47 CFR §73.333 F(50,50) contour distance — minimum HAAT edge case
provenance.source: fcc.tvfmfs_metric(erp=0.1, haat=30, ch=264, field=60, dist=0, mode=2, curve=0, flag); haat_input=10m clamped_to=30m
provenance.edge_case_note: FCC clamps HAAT to minimum 30 m per FCC curve boundary. Input 10 m → used 30 m. Tests clamp logic and low-HAAT / low-ERP boundary of the interpolation grid.

cases.label: Edge: 6 kW, HAAT 100 m, 88.1 MHz (FM band low edge, ch=201) → 60 dBu

provenance.method: 47 CFR §73.333 F(50,50) contour distance — FM band low-edge frequency
provenance.source: fcc.tvfmfs_metric(erp=6, haat=100, ch=201, field=60, dist=0, mode=2, curve=0, flag)
provenance.edge_case_note: FM F(50,50) tables are frequency-independent (channels 200-300 all use the Low-VHF tabulation). 88.1 MHz (ch=201) produces the same distance as mid-band, confirming the FCC table is channel-family-based, not per-frequency. Expected value matches Class A 98.7 MHz case (fm.f5050.class_a.60dbu) by design.

cases.label: Edge: 6 kW, HAAT 100 m, 107.9 MHz (FM band high edge, ch=300) → 60 dBu

provenance.method: 47 CFR §73.333 F(50,50) contour distance — FM band high-edge frequency
provenance.source: fcc.tvfmfs_metric(erp=6, haat=100, ch=300, field=60, dist=0, mode=2, curve=0, flag)
provenance.edge_case_note: 107.9 MHz (ch=300) is the FM band high edge. Like the low edge, FM tables are frequency-independent; identical result confirms no frequency dependence in the F(50,50) lookup for FM channels.

cases.label: Edge: Class C1 regulatory maximum (100 kW, HAAT 299 m), 100.7 MHz → 60 dBu

provenance.method: 47 CFR §73.333 F(50,50) contour distance — Class C1 regulatory limits
provenance.source: fcc.tvfmfs_metric(erp=100, haat=299, ch=264, field=60, dist=0, mode=2, curve=0, flag)
provenance.edge_case_note: 47 CFR §73.211 Class C1 maximum: 100 kW ERP, 299 m HAAT. Tests the ERP/HAAT combination at the boundary between Class C1 and Class C.

cases.label: KSLX-FM F(50,10) — 40 dBu (§74.1204 co-channel exclusion vs 60 dBu D, G=20)

provenance.method: 47 CFR §73.333 F(50,10) contour distance — §74.1204(c) co-channel D/U gate
provenance.source: fcc.tvfmfs_metric(erp=100, haat=561, ch=264, field=40, dist=0, mode=2, curve=1, flag)
provenance.regulatory_note: Protected field = 60 dBu (Class A/B/C); D/U = 20 dB; interfering threshold = 60−20 = 40 dBu per 47 CFR §74.1204(c)(1).

cases.label: KSLX-FM F(50,10) — 54 dBu (§74.1204 1st-adjacent vs 60 dBu D, G=6)

provenance.method: 47 CFR §73.333 F(50,10) contour distance — §74.1204(c) 1st-adjacent D/U gate
provenance.source: fcc.tvfmfs_metric(erp=100, haat=561, ch=264, field=54, dist=0, mode=2, curve=1, flag)
provenance.regulatory_note: Protected field = 60 dBu; D/U = 6 dB; interfering threshold = 60−6 = 54 dBu per 47 CFR §74.1204(c)(2).

cases.label: KSLX-FM F(50,10) — 34 dBu (§74.1204 co-channel vs 54 dBu D)

provenance.method: 47 CFR §73.333 F(50,10) contour distance — §74.1204(c) co-channel D/U gate vs Class B/C primary
provenance.source: fcc.tvfmfs_metric(erp=100, haat=561, ch=264, field=34, dist=0, mode=2, curve=1, flag)
provenance.regulatory_note: Protected field = 54 dBu (Class B/C); D/U = 20 dB; interfering threshold = 54−20 = 34 dBu per 47 CFR §74.1204(c)(1).

cases.label: Generic 1 kW / HAAT 100 m / 100 MHz F(50,10) → 40 dBu

provenance.method: 47 CFR §73.333 F(50,10) contour distance — low-power translator reference
provenance.source: fcc.tvfmfs_metric(erp=1, haat=100, ch=261, field=40, dist=0, mode=2, curve=1, flag)
provenance.regulatory_note: Typical LPFM/FX §74.1204 co-channel exclusion contour at 1 kW ERP.

cases.label: Generic 1 kW / HAAT 100 m / 100 MHz F(50,10) → 54 dBu

provenance.method: 47 CFR §73.333 F(50,10) contour distance — low-power translator reference
provenance.source: fcc.tvfmfs_metric(erp=1, haat=100, ch=261, field=54, dist=0, mode=2, curve=1, flag)
provenance.regulatory_note: LPFM/FX §74.1204 1st-adjacent exclusion contour at 1 kW ERP.

cases.label: Edge F(50,10): 100 kW, HAAT 1200 m, 100.7 MHz → 40 dBu (§74.1204 co-channel, high-site scenario)

provenance.method: 47 CFR §73.333 F(50,10) contour distance — extreme HAAT edge case
provenance.source: fcc.tvfmfs_metric(erp=100, haat=1200, ch=264, field=40, dist=0, mode=2, curve=1, flag); haat_used=1200m (no clamp)
provenance.edge_case_note: Mountain-top translator scenario. 1200 m HAAT is within FCC clamp range [30,1600]; exercises upper portion of F(50,10) HAAT interpolation.

cases.label: Edge F(50,10): 100 W, HAAT 30 m (FCC minimum), 100.7 MHz → 40 dBu

provenance.method: 47 CFR §73.333 F(50,10) contour distance — minimum HAAT / minimum ERP edge case
provenance.source: fcc.tvfmfs_metric(erp=0.1, haat=30, ch=264, field=40, dist=0, mode=2, curve=1, flag); haat at FCC minimum
provenance.edge_case_note: 30 m HAAT is the FCC lower bound for the interpolation grid. Tests the corner of the (min-ERP, min-HAAT) interpolation domain.

cases.label: AM 1030 kHz / 50 kW / σ=8 mS/m → 5 mV/m city grade

provenance.method: 47 CFR §73.183/§73.184 groundwave (Sommerfeld-Norton)
provenance.source: fcc.amDistanceKm(sigma=8, eps=15, freq=1030, field=5, fs1km=707.1)

cases.label: AM 1030 kHz / 50 kW / σ=8 mS/m → 2 mV/m primary contour

provenance.method: 47 CFR §73.183/§73.184 groundwave (Sommerfeld-Norton)
provenance.source: fcc.amDistanceKm(sigma=8, eps=15, freq=1030, field=2, fs1km=707.1)

cases.label: AM 1030 kHz / 50 kW / σ=8 mS/m → 0.5 mV/m secondary contour

provenance.method: 47 CFR §73.183/§73.184 groundwave (Sommerfeld-Norton)
provenance.source: fcc.amDistanceKm(sigma=8, eps=15, freq=1030, field=0.5, fs1km=707.1)

cases.label: AM 1030 kHz / 50 kW / σ=8 mS/m → 0.025 mV/m night interference

provenance.method: 47 CFR §73.183/§73.184 groundwave (Sommerfeld-Norton)
provenance.source: fcc.amDistanceKm(sigma=8, eps=15, freq=1030, field=0.025, fs1km=707.1)

cases.label: AM 1240 kHz / 1 kW / σ=4 mS/m → 2 mV/m primary

provenance.method: 47 CFR §73.183/§73.184 groundwave (Sommerfeld-Norton)
provenance.source: fcc.amDistanceKm(sigma=4, eps=15, freq=1240, field=2, fs1km=100.0)

cases.label: AM 540 kHz (low band) / 10 kW / σ=2 mS/m → 5 mV/m

provenance.method: 47 CFR §73.183/§73.184 groundwave (Sommerfeld-Norton) — low-band frequency
provenance.source: fcc.amDistanceKm(sigma=2, eps=15, freq=540, field=5, fs1km=316.2)
provenance.edge_case_note: 540 kHz is the AM broadcast band low edge (§73.201). Tests the low-frequency boundary of the groundwave field grid.

cases.label: AM 540 kHz / 10 kW / σ=2 mS/m → 0.5 mV/m secondary

provenance.method: 47 CFR §73.183/§73.184 groundwave (Sommerfeld-Norton)
provenance.source: fcc.amDistanceKm(sigma=2, eps=15, freq=540, field=0.5, fs1km=316.2)

cases.label: AM 1700 kHz (upper band) / 5 kW / σ=6 mS/m → 5 mV/m

provenance.method: 47 CFR §73.183/§73.184 groundwave (Sommerfeld-Norton) — upper-band frequency
provenance.source: fcc.amDistanceKm(sigma=6, eps=15, freq=1700, field=5, fs1km=223.6)
provenance.edge_case_note: 1700 kHz is the AM broadcast band high edge (§73.201). Tests the upper-frequency boundary of the groundwave field grid.

cases.label: AM 1700 kHz / 5 kW / σ=6 mS/m → 0.5 mV/m secondary

provenance.method: 47 CFR §73.183/§73.184 groundwave (Sommerfeld-Norton)
provenance.source: fcc.amDistanceKm(sigma=6, eps=15, freq=1700, field=0.5, fs1km=223.6)

cases.label: Edge AM: 1030 kHz / 50 kW / σ=1 mS/m (FCC M3 minimum, desert/rock) → 2 mV/m

provenance.method: 47 CFR §73.183/§73.184 groundwave — minimum conductivity edge case
provenance.source: fcc.amDistanceKm(sigma=1, eps=15, freq=1030, field=2, fs1km=707.1)
provenance.edge_case_note: σ=1 mS/m is the FCC M3 ground conductivity table minimum (arid/rocky terrain). Tests the low-conductivity boundary where groundwave propagation is most attenuated.

cases.label: Edge AM: 1700 kHz / 50 kW / σ=8 mS/m (FCC M3 maximum) → 2 mV/m

provenance.method: 47 CFR §73.183/§73.184 groundwave — maximum conductivity + upper-band frequency edge case
provenance.source: fcc.amDistanceKm(sigma=8, eps=15, freq=1700, field=2, fs1km=707.1)
provenance.edge_case_note: σ=8 mS/m is the FCC M3 maximum (rich agricultural soil / coastal). Upper-frequency + maximum-conductivity combination exercises the far corner of the groundwave grid.

cases.label: Edge AM: 630 kHz / 50 kW / σ=4 mS/m → 0.1 mV/m (nighttime protection distance)

provenance.method: 47 CFR §73.183/§73.184 groundwave — far-field / nighttime interference edge case
provenance.source: fcc.amDistanceKm(sigma=4, eps=15, freq=630, field=0.1, fs1km=707.1)
provenance.edge_case_note: 0.1 mV/m threshold is used for night skywave interference protection in some Class B applications. Tests the far-range end of the groundwave table.

cases.label: Edge AM: 1030 kHz / 250 W (Class D minimum) / σ=4 mS/m → 2 mV/m

provenance.method: 47 CFR §73.183/§73.184 groundwave — low-ERP (Class D) edge case
provenance.source: fcc.amDistanceKm(sigma=4, eps=15, freq=1030, field=2, fs1km=50.0)
provenance.edge_case_note: 250 W is typical of Class D daytime-only or low-power AM operations. fs1km = 100·√0.25 = 50.0 mV/m. Tests the low-ERP boundary of the groundwave computation.

cases.label: Inverse F(50,50): KSLX-FM 100 kW / 561 m at 90.193 km → field should be ~60 dBu

provenance.method: 47 CFR §73.333 F(50,50) field strength at distance (round-trip verification)
provenance.source: fcc.tvfmfs_metric(erp=100, haat=561, ch=264, field=0, dist=90.193, mode=1, curve=0, flag)
provenance.inverse_note: Distance 90.193 km is the locked expected value for fm.f5050.kslx_class_c.60dbu. Inverse must return ~60 dBu to verify the forward/inverse pair are consistent. Observed residual < 0.001 dBu.

cases.label: Inverse F(50,50): Class A 6 kW / 100 m at 28.295 km → field should be ~60 dBu

provenance.method: 47 CFR §73.333 F(50,50) field strength at distance (round-trip verification)
provenance.source: fcc.tvfmfs_metric(erp=6, haat=100, ch=257, field=0, dist=28.295, mode=1, curve=0, flag)
provenance.inverse_note: Round-trip for fm.f5050.class_a.60dbu. Observed residual < 0.002 dBu.

cases.label: Inverse F(50,10): KSLX-FM 100 kW / 561 m at 195.102 km → field should be ~40 dBu

provenance.method: 47 CFR §73.333 F(50,10) field strength at distance (round-trip verification)
provenance.source: fcc.tvfmfs_metric(erp=100, haat=561, ch=264, field=0, dist=195.102, mode=1, curve=1, flag)
provenance.inverse_note: Round-trip for fm.f5010.kslx_class_c.40dbu. Observed residual < 0.001 dBu. Validates that §74.1204 co-channel exclusion contour radius and field are consistent.

cases.label: Inverse AM: 1030 kHz / 50 kW / σ=8 mS/m at 58.633 km → field should be ~2 mV/m

provenance.method: 47 CFR §73.183/§73.184 groundwave field at distance (round-trip verification)
provenance.source: fcc.amField(sigma=8, eps=15, freq=1030, dist=58.633, fs1km=707.1)
provenance.inverse_note: Round-trip for am.gwave.1030khz_50kw_s8.2mvm. Observed residual 0.002 mV/m (0.1%). Grid quantization at 10 kHz / integer sigma produces this small asymmetry.

cases.label: Inverse AM: 1030 kHz / 50 kW / σ=8 mS/m at 38.613 km → field should be ~5 mV/m

provenance.method: 47 CFR §73.183/§73.184 groundwave field at distance (round-trip verification)
provenance.source: fcc.amField(sigma=8, eps=15, freq=1030, dist=38.613, fs1km=707.1)
provenance.inverse_note: Round-trip for am.gwave.1030khz_50kw_s8.5mvm. Observed residual 0.022 mV/m (0.44%) — maximum observed AM inverse residual in the suite. Within 0.1 mV/m tolerance.

cases.label: Inverse AM: 540 kHz / 10 kW / σ=2 mS/m at 70.742 km → field should be ~0.5 mV/m

provenance.method: 47 CFR §73.183/§73.184 groundwave field at distance (round-trip verification) — low-band frequency
provenance.source: fcc.amField(sigma=2, eps=15, freq=540, dist=70.742, fs1km=316.2)
provenance.inverse_note: Round-trip for am.gwave.540khz_10kw_s2.05mvm at low-band frequency. Observed residual 0.001 mV/m (0.12%).
